The Arena Sports Garden

Live Boxing • Pool Tables • Ice Cold Drinks

🔥 Tonight's Big Match!

Watch the heavyweight title fight live on our big screens starting at 8:00 PM.

Free Entry

What We Offer

🥊 Live Boxing Nights

Catch every local and international fight night on massive projector screens with loud sound.

🎱 Professional Pool Tables

We have 4 well-lit, standard pool tables. Winner stays on! Challenge your friends daily.

🍻 Drinks & Pork Joint

Ice cold beers, soft drinks, local juices, and freshly grilled pork or chicken available all night.

📍 Located near the Trading Centre, Next to Total Station

📞 For Table Reservations: +256 700 000 000
